$comment: SAFE EXAMPLE — copy to .claude/settings.json to activate. Review every line first: hooks run with your OS permissions. This file wires (a) the deny-list that removes merge/push/destructive authority from ALL agents by default, and (b) the two governance hooks. Hook scripts must be activated first (copy the .example.js files to plain .js — see .claude/hooks/README.md).

permissions.$commentDeny: No agent gets merge/push/history-rewrite/bulk-delete authority by default; grant per-action by approving an explicit human-authorized exception in the session. CLAUDE.md and settings.json are self-protection: the constitution and its enforcement must not be editable by the agents they govern.
